message:
feat(vectordb): implement full invoke handler with operation dispatch and introspection

Implement handle_invoke with dispatch for all 9 operations:
list_collections, describe_collection, create_collection,
delete_collection, query_vectors, fetch_vectors, upsert_vectors,
delete_vectors, update_vector_metadata.

- handle_introspect returning full Introspection with operation metadata
- Capability verification and input validation helpers
- required_capability_for_operation mapping
- vectordb_operations() for operation info registry
- Comprehensive unit tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
